g.text: Wildfire histories occupy recurring developmental gradients.

text.style: font-size: 8.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #62666d

g.text: Fires follow continuous patterns in timing, persistence, pulse structure, reactivation, and termination.

path.style: fill: #ffffff; opacity: 0.96; stroke: #3b78b6; stroke-linejoin: miter

g.text: Takeaway: development varies along continuous gradients, not as hard discrete types.
